series_description: Microfiche copies of active nurses.
retention_statement: Microform: Continually maintained and updated in office.

series_description: Listing of lapsed and inactive by registration number.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until subsequent biennial list is received

series_description: Report of periodic audit of all transactions by State Auditor.
retention_statement: Paper: Continually maintained and updated in office.

series_description: This record series consist of incomplete applications for licensure.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until the fee is no longer viable or until the audit report for the period in which the application fee is no longer viable is received, which ever is later

series_description: Records of each meeting including names of members present, all business matters considered and action taken, including exhibits.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years ; Microform: Retain permanently in office.

series_description: Records of each meeting including names of members present, all business matters considered and action taken, including exhibits.
retention_statement: Paper: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent

series_title: MINUTES OF ADVISORY GROUPS AND COMMITTEES TO BOARD
series_description: Records of each meeting including names of members present, all business and matters considered and action taken.
retention_statement: Paper: 5 years ; Electronic: 5 years

series_title: LISTS OF BOARD MEMBERS AND ADVISORY GROUPS AND COMMITTEES
series_description: Names, dates of appointment and termination for all appointees.
retention_statement: Paper: 10 years ; Electronic: 10 years

series_title: NON-PUBLIC INFORMATION MONTHLY ATTESTATION AND SPECIFIC ACCESS LOGS
series_description: Monthly employee attestation regarding access to non-public personal information computer databases, and logs of specific access to non-public personal information in computer databases, not at an individual''s request, and outside the scope of employment or normally assigned job duties.
retention_statement: Paper: 2 years, or after audit by Auditor of State and after audit report is released, whichever is later. ; Electronic: 2 years, or after audit by Auditor of State and after audit report is released, whichever is later.

series_description: Includes public records comprised of internal correspondence (letters, memos); also correspondence from the general public requesting information pertaining to the Board and other miscellaneous inquiries.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 30 days unless correspondence has administrative, legal, or historical value ; Electronic: Retain 30 days unless correspondence has administrative, legal, or historical value

series_description: Monthly Transaction Register, Purchased Personal Service, Expenditures by Object, Detail Outstanding Encumbrances, Comparison of Budget to Actual Analysis of Funds in Payroll or other items of a summary nature.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 2 prior fiscal biennial periods, provided audited ; Electronic: Retain for 2 prior fiscal biennial periods, provided audited

series_description: Checks and correspondence pertainin to checks from applicants for licensure/certification which are returned by the Treasurer''''s Office.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until acceptable payment is received ; Electronic: Retain until acceptable payment is received

series_description: Contractual agreements between Board and third parties, e.g. personal service contracts, servicing of equipment.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 2 years or until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released, whichever is later. ; Electronic: Retain for 2 years or until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released, whichever is later.

series_description: Annual Report of equipment owned by the Board.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 3 years or until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released, whichever is later.

series_description: Applications for initial licensure or certification by examination or endorsement.
retention_statement: Microform: Retain for 100 years. ; Paper: Retain paper original for 3 months or until transfer to microfilm or electronic media verified. ; Electronic: Retain for 100 years.
disposition: Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase

series_title: APPLICATIONS BOARD OF NURSING MEDICATION CARD
series_description: This series consist of documentation submitted to receive a Board of Nursing medication card, and documentation submitted to receive a Board of Nursing IV therapy card.
retention_statement: Microform: Microfilm retained 100 years. ; Paper: Retain paper original for 3 months or until transfer to microfilm or electronic media verified. ; Electronic: Electronically imaged copy retained 100 years.
disposition: Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase

series_title: RENEWAL, REINSTATEMENT AND REACTIVATION APPLICATIONS FOR LICENSURE/CERTIFICATION
series_description: Applications for renewal of licensure and certification.
retention_statement: Microform: Retain 100 years. ; Paper: Retain paper original for 3 months or until transfer to microfilm or electronic media verified. ; Electronic: Retain electronically imaged copy 100 years.
disposition: Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase

series_title: CONSENT AGREEMENTS AND PIIP MONITORING RECORDS
series_description: Records monitoring a nurse's compliance with the requirements imposed by the Board.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until the Board takes action releasing monitored party from Board requirements, or until Board action is taken based upon the monitored party's non-compliance, or until monitoring has not been active for five (5) years, unless needed for legal and/or administrative reasons. ; Paper: Retain until the Board takes action releasing monitored party from Board requirements, or until Board action is taken based upon the monitored party's non-compliance, or until monitoring has not been active for five (5) years, unless needed for legal and/or administrative reasons.

series_description: Records monitoring an individual''s compliance with Alternative Program requirements imposed by Board.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years from the date the Board takes action releasing monitored individual from Board requirements, or from date individual is terminated for failure to comply with requirements, unless record is needed for longer period of time based on legal or administrative significance. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years from the date the Board takes action releasing monitored individual from Board requirements, or from date individual is terminated for failure to comply with requirements, unless record is needed for longer period of time based on legal or administrative significance.

series_title: LIST OF EDUCATION AND TRAINING PROGRAMS
series_description: Nursing education and Dialysis Technician, Medication Aide, and Certified Community Health Worker training programs.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded by an updated list. ; Electronic: Retain until superseded by an updated list.

series_title: NURSING EDUCATION PROGRAM SURVEY REPORTS, PROGRAM RESPONSES AND PROGRESS REPORTS
series_description: Reports of surveys made of nursing education programs, program responses to survey visit reports, correspondence related to survey and/or responses, and progress reports.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years or until subsequent survey visit is completed, whichever is later. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years or until subsequent survey visit is completed, whichever is later.

series_title: APPLICATION FOR EDUCATION OR TRAINING PROGRAM APPROVAL
series_description: Contains pertinent data and information concerning curriculum, physical and clinical resources used, educational background of faculty, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: 5 years after full approval status is granted. ; Electronic: 5 years after full approval status is granted.

series_title: DIALYSIS, CHW, MED AIDE TRAINING PROGRAM SURVEY REPORTS, PROGRAM RESPONSES & PROGRESS REPORTS
series_description: Reports of surveys made of Dialysis, Med Aide, and Certified Health Worker training programs, program responses, correspondence related to survey and/or responses, and progress reports.
retention_statement: Paper: 2 years, or until subsequent survey visit is completed, whichever is later. ; Electronic: 2 years, or until subsequent survey visit is completed, whichever is later.

series_description: Correspondence or forms received by Board expressing dissatisfaction with education or training program and not containing a complaint regarding a license.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until next Board meeting following receipt of the dissatisfaction form, at which the program''s approval status is reviewed and acted upon by the Board. ; Electronic: Retain until next Board meeting following receipt of the dissatisfaction form, at which the program''s approval status is reviewed and acted upon by the Board.

series_title: CHANGE OF CONTROL OF EDUCATION OR TRAINING PROGRAM
series_description: Notification by controlling agency of change in control.
retention_statement: Paper: 5 years. ; Electronic: 5 years.

series_description: Reports required to be submitted to Board annually by OAC 4723-5-05.
retention_statement: Paper: 5 years or until subsequent survey visit is completed, whichever is later. ; Electronic: 5 years or until subsequent survey visit is completed, whichever is later.

series_description: Records of each meeting including names of members present, all business matters considered and action taken.
retention_statement: Paper: Permanent ; Electronic: Transitory material including but not limited to audio recordings, working notes, etc, will be electronically deleted once the official minutes have been approved and signed by the Board''s President and Secretary. If in paper form, the document will be recycled or trashed, if not recyclable.

series_description: Includes hearing transcripts, evidence submitted at hearings, hearing results, affidavits/exhibits in cases in which no hearing was required and Board actions (e.g., Orders, Notices, Consent Agreements).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper records until electronically imaged. ; Electronic: Retain electronic copy of Board action, e.g., Board Order, Consent Agreement, Notices, permanently.

series_description: Documentation of request for public record, and response provided. Documentation may include log containing information, or the actual request and information provided.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 2 years or until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released, whichever is later. ; Electronic: Retain for 2 years or until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released, whichever is later.

series_description: Nurse Education Grant Program (NEGP) records, including grant proposals, correspondence, grant awards, and agreements.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 2 years or until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released, whichever is later. ; Electronic: Retain for 2 years or until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released, whichever is later.

series_description: REcords monitoring an individual''s compliance with Alternative Program requirements imposed by the Board.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper records not less than two years from the date the Board takes action releasing monitored individual from Board requirements, or from date individual is terminated for failure to comply with requirements, unless record is needed for longer period of time based on legal or administrative significance. ; Electronic: Retain paper records not less than two years from the date the Board takes action releasing monitored individual from Board requirements, or from date individual is terminated for failure to comply with requirements, unless record is needed for longer period of time based on legal or administrative significance.

series_description: Education Pre-Survey Visit Report submitted by Nursing Education Program prior to the Board''s announced survey visit.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until Board action is taken regarding the approval status of the Nursing Education Program. ; Electronic: Retain until Board action is taken regarding the approval status of the Nursing Education Program.

series_description: Worksheets, notes and correspondence involving Board Hearing Committee Cases.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two years after Board takes action on the case, unless needed for longer period of time based on legal or administrative significance. ; Electronic: Retain for two years after Board takes action on the case, unless needed for longer period of time based on legal or administrative significance.

series_description: Worksheets, notes, and correspondence involving Board Hearing Examiner cases.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two years after Board takes action on the case, unless needed for longer period of time based on legal or administrative significance. ; Electronic: Retain for two years after Board takes action on the case, unless needed for longer period of time based on legal or administrative significance.

series_description: Hearings on adoption and revision of administrative rules.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two (2) years after rule published ; Electronic: Retain for two (2) years after rule published

series_description: Application for licensure/certification remains incomplete for more than one (1) year.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 2 years or after audit by Auditor of State and after audit report is released, whichever is later ; Electronic: Retain for 2 years or after audit by Auditor of State and after audit report is released, whichever is later

series_description: Copies of all application forms, personnel actions, benefit forms, training records, discipline records, personal information regarding medical information, performance evaluations, commendation letters, tax and payroll information, and any other documents concerning employee files.
retention_statement: Paper: After employee’s employment with the Board of Nursing is terminated, retain 7 years ; Electronic: After employee’s employment with the Board of Nursing is terminated, retain 7 years

series_title: INCIDENT REPORTS/NOT INCLUDED IN PERSONNEL FILES
series_description: Incident Reports authored by employees to document incidents or unusual events at the Board of Nursing.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain three (3) years ; Electronic: Retain three (3) years

series_title: FORMULARY ESTABLISHED BY COMMITTEE ON PRESCRIPTIVE GOVERNANCE
series_description: The formulary established by the Board Committee on Prescriptive Governance which must be posted on the Board website according to OAC 4723-9-10.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain past editions of formulary permanently at Board office. ; Electronic: Retain current formulary on Board website. Retain past editions of formulary permanently at Board office.

series_title: EXCLUSIONARY FORMULARY ADOPTED BY THE BOARD ON OR AFTER MAY 17, 2017
series_description: The formulary established by the Board Committee on Prescriptive Governance, on or after May 17, 2017, which must be posted on the Board website according to OAC 4723-9-10.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain current formulary on Board website as required by OAC 4723-9-10; retain past editions of formulary permanently in paper or electronic form at Board office. ; Electronic: Retain current formulary on Board website as required by OAC 4723-9-10; retain past editions of formulary permanently in paper or electronic form at Board office.

series_description: Electronic and paper records containing criminal background check reports required to be obtained by the Board for licensure/ certification of applicants.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 1 year ; Paper: Retain until application for licensure/certification is received by Board and content of record is reviewed according to "Processing Criminal Background Check Results and Reports" Board policy.

series_description: This record series consist of a card summarizing basic licensure data of licensees.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until information contained on card is transferred to electronic storage. ; Electronic: Retain until licensee reaches the age of 85 and the license is inactive or lapsed

series_description: Investigatory files including reports, correspondence, medical and other records gathered by investigators.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper records until final Board action ; Electronic: Retain electronic record 1 year after final action or date complaint is closed

series_description: Documentation of meeting approval criteria for organizations certifying advance practice nursing specialities and dialysis technicians.
retention_statement: Paper: Reviewed annually for re-approval. Retain until superseded ; Electronic: Reviewed annually for re-approval. Retain until superseded

series_description: Initial approval and re-approval applications and supporting documentation.
retention_statement: Paper: Reviewed every 5 years. Retain in Board Office until superseded ; Electronic: Reviewed every 5 years. Retain in Board Office until superseded

series_description: Includes Forms requesting verification of meeting the Board''s requirements, proof, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Reviewed every 2 years. Retain until superseded ; Electronic: Reviewed every 2 years. Retain until superseded

series_description: When received, hard copy address changes are scanned to the licensee/certificate holder’s electronic file then discarded. When received, hard copy name changes are scanned to the licensee/certificate holder’s electronic file, and the name change documents are then returned to the licensee/certificate holder.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for three (3) business days. Return any name change documents. ; Electronic: Retain for three (3) business days. Return any name change documents.

series_description: Records documenting the entry and departure of visitors into the Board of Nursing offices during and/or after office hours.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year

series_description: Documentation of meeting approval criteria for organizations certifying advance practice nurses and dialysis technicians.
retention_statement: Paper: Reviewed annually. Destroy when new approval is issued. ; Electronic: Reviewed annually. Destroy when new approval is issued.

series_description: LIsts of individuals who have been certified as an advance practice nurse
retention_statement: Paper: 5 years ; Electronic: 5 years
